code: export const ROLEPLAY_THEME_STORAGE_KEY='nitro.roleplay.theme';export const DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME={primary:'#0d6091'};const clamp=(value,min,max)=>Math.min(Math.max(value,min),max);const normalizeHex=value=>{const trimmed=String(value||'').trim();const match=trimmed.match(/^#?([\da-f]{3}|[\da-f]{6})$/i);if(!match)return DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME.primary;let hex=match[1];if(hex.length===3)hex=hex.split('').map(char=>char+char).join('');return`#${hex.toLowerCase()}`;};const hexToRgb=value=>{const hex=normalizeHex(value).slice(1);return{r:parseInt(hex.slice(0,2),16),g:parseInt(hex.slice(2,4),16),b:parseInt(hex.slice(4,6),16)};};const rgbToHex=(r,g,b)=>{const toHex=channel=>clamp(Math.round(channel),0,255).toString(16).padStart(2,'0');return`#${toHex(r)}${toHex(g)}${toHex(b)}`;};const mixHex=(base,target,amount)=>{const from=hexToRgb(base);const to=hexToRgb(target);const weight=clamp(amount,0,1);return rgbToHex(from.r+(to.r-from.r)*weight,from.g+(to.g-from.g)*weight,from.b+(to.b-from.b)*weight);};const withAlpha=(value,alpha)=>{const{r,g,b}=hexToRgb(value);return`rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${clamp(alpha,0,1)})`;};export const getRoleplayTheme=()=>{try{const raw=localStorage.getItem(ROLEPLAY_THEME_STORAGE_KEY);if(!raw)return{...DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME};const parsed=JSON.parse(raw);return{primary:normalizeHex(parsed.primary||DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME.primary)};}catch{return{...DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME};}};export const saveRoleplayTheme=theme=>{const nextTheme={...DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME,...theme,primary:normalizeHex(theme.primary||DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME.primary)};localStorage.setItem(ROLEPLAY_THEME_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(nextTheme));return nextTheme;};export const resetRoleplayTheme=()=>{localStorage.removeItem(ROLEPLAY_THEME_STORAGE_KEY);return{...DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME};};export const applyRoleplayTheme=theme=>{const root=document.documentElement;const primary=normalizeHex(theme.primary||DEFAULT_ROLEPLAY_THEME.primary);const border=mixHex(primary,'#ffffff',0.18);const darkSurface=mixHex(primary,'#000000',0.28);const darkerSurface=mixHex(primary,'#000000',0.4);const hoverSurface=mixHex(primary,'#ffffff',0.08);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-primary',primary);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-border',border);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-surface',darkSurface);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-surface-strong',darkerSurface);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-hover',hoverSurface);root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-shadow-soft',withAlpha(primary,0.28));root.style.setProperty('--rp-theme-shadow-strong',withAlpha(primary,0.4));};
